items.name: Roman "Dura Europos" Quiver
items.description:
"..Things seemed hopeless and almost the whole Roman Empire had been
 lost..." - Eutropius, in his "Breviarium Historiae Romanae"

The quiver was an integral part in the kit of an archer. The arrows in this quiver are based off of arrows found at Dura Europos, which had been painted in various areas.

Created by: Erika/Jimmy
Modeled by: Jimmy
Textured by: Erika

Thanks to our friend Jimmy for modeling this for us!
